words.def: either of two offspring born at the same time from the same pregnancy
words.zh: n. 雙胞胎中一人, 一對非常相像的人(或物)中的一個

words.def: a victory (as in a race or other competition)
words.zh: vt. 贏得, 打勝, 成功

words.def: a silvery malleable metallic element that resists corrosion; used in many alloys and to coat other metals to prevent corrosion; obtained chiefly from cassiterite where it occurs as tin oxide
words.zh: n. 錫, 馬口鐵, 罐頭
